headline: Is It Time To Reconsider UPS (NYSE:UPS) After Recent Share Price Weakness?
summary: Wondering if United Parcel Service (UPS) stock is priced fairly or if the current level offers value for long term investors? This article breaks down what the numbers actually say. The stock last closed at US$103.26, with returns showing a fall of 5.0% over the past week, a 3.3% gain over 30 days, 2.2% year to date, 9.1% over 1 year, and declines of 30.4% and 35.4% over 3 and 5 years respectively. Recent coverage around UPS has focused on its role as a major global logistics provider, with...
